title: Radiology Report Search Hub
summary: Search prior reports, imaging findings, and clinical notes to speed radiology review and case comparison workflows.
knowledge_base: User: radiologists comparing current cases to prior findings.
Primary pain: prior report retrieval is slow when case similarity is buried in large archives.
Decision output: retrieve similar findings and recommended report context.
Business impact: faster turnaround and more consistent reporting.

app_modules.label: Radio 01
app_modules.title: Similar Case Search
app_modules.description: Search prior radiology reports for relevant similar findings.
app_modules.prefill: Show prior chest CT reports with bilateral ground-glass opacities and no pleural effusion.

app_modules.label: Radio 02
app_modules.title: Archive Performance Review
app_modules.description: Review retrieval quality and turnaround improvement against baseline search behavior.

app_modules.label: Radio 03
app_modules.title: Report Prep Note
app_modules.description: Generate a prep note highlighting comparable prior cases before signoff.
